title: (Bearish Signal) QTRX, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on January 12, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that QTRX's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 20 similar cases where QTRX's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 19 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $68.13 is above $47.21 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/09/20 - 01/12/21, the price experienced a +34% Uptrend. During the week of 01/05/21 - 01/12/21, the stock enjoyed a +33% Uptrend growth. 

https://preview.redd.it/ac7v58mfv5b61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=0a2e8b97def676f2c68ae7b5911827b0b040ca37

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator demonstrated that the stock has entered the overbought zone. This may point to a price pull-back soon.

The Stochastic Indicator has been in the overbought zone for 1 day. Expect a price pull-back in the near future.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where QTRX declined for three days, the price rose further, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 76%.

QTRX broke above its upper Bollinger Band on January 11, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8739056-quanterix-qtrx-59-59-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-january-12-2021?utm_source=raddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
